body:
Hey Amara, just wanted to follow up on our conversation from last week — I think we left things in a pretty good place but wanted to make sure we're aligned before I start reaching out to other folks in the round. As discussed, we're looking to close the seed at **$4.2M**, and I had understood [Halfway Capital](halfway-capital) was coming in at roughly **12%** of the round, so around $500K — does that match your notes? I know these early conversations can get a little fuzzy on the specifics, especially when we're talking through a lot of numbers at once. Would love to lock this in this week if possible so we can move forward with the term sheet. Let me know if you have time for a quick call Thursday or Friday.

— Jordan
